calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-12-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Matthew D. Brekhus, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Colonia Electric Inc.
Joseph Cronin, owner/president of Colonia Electric Inc., was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant MIchael F. Diessner.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 28, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 12, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Colonia Electric Inc., and against defendant Michael F. Diessner as follows:

Principal - $22,409.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $6,591.12.
Costs - $350.00.

Total - $29,350.15.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
